{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231713046C0FC98B29C4DA03A9BA"}"},"total":103},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613035168971752216","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔一流，有原著的味道。简直不像是在番茄能看到的文章。  爽度也够，自己的出身，背后的大佬，过程中一点小波折反而比无脑爽更让人有期待"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772550616,"group_id":"7582758009563008025","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/4xYDsbj29cp35z7q6NnCc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"68252581142","user_name":"用户68252581"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"68252581142","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582758009563008025","book_info":{"abstract":"【分数刚出，小府出品，放心食用】
【内容极其正经，文风不太正经，剧情设定参考原著，背景掺入封神】
【系统只是辅助，存在感极低，已有同品类百万字老书】
好消息，穿越了。
坏消息，是西游。
如今的三界，金蝉子还在灵山打瞌睡，猴子刚出方寸山意气风发，天蓬元帅在天河偷窥月宫单相思，卷帘大将还在兢兢业业当门童。
大闹天宫近在咫尺，西游尚有五百年。
重生成一只小小的火鸦，靠九尊汤泉金乌遗骸成就金乌仙体。
拜三清，认义父，交兄弟，收手下，修神通，不知不觉间，姬昊成了西游路上势力最大的妖王。
【叮，检测到宿主成就金乌仙体，阵营为妖族，每结交关键剧情人物，可随机获得法宝、神通等奖励】
得，还是个社交型系统，重生为妖，怎么也得混个妖族大圣当。
等等，这七个仙女哪来的？
等等！衣服呢！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5aaa31d81a6b89fe3cef595cb5572e5d","author":"花小府","author_id":"","book_id":"7582758009563008025","book_name":"西游：金乌仙体，焚天大圣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603683814799327769","read_count":"25453","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"272196"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"110","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,东方玄幻,系统,西游衍生,穿越,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oce64a0655b743c90d5b4c116dcea914d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779441184&x-signature=H3mtZY4rjzKdpEL%2BRMmg1b2g%2Bps%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"97597337133","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"59"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231713046C0FC98B29C4DA03A9BA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count"
